title: Utility Golems
description: A Minecraft automation mod that adds buildable utility golems to handle farming, item transport, resource gathering, and other tasks using simple, vanilla-style mechanics.
body:
# Utility Golems

![cover](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1593/552/hay_and_mud_golems-png.png)

Utility Golems is a vanilla-friendly automation mod for Minecraft Forge 1.20.1 that introduces functional, buildable golems designed to handle everyday tasks.

Instead of relying on complex machines or multiblock systems, this mod focuses on simple, immersive automation. Golems are constructed directly in the world using familiar materials and behave as natural extensions of Minecraft’s mechanics.

Build your own helpers to manage farming, resource gathering, and more - no machines required!

## Features

*   Buildable utility golems (no natural spawning)
*   Farming automation using entity-based behaviour
*   Uses nearby containers for storage and resources
*   No GUIs, cables, or power systems
*   Designed to fit naturally into survival gameplay

***

## Hay Golem

The Hay Golem maintains crop growth and keeps farmland productive.


<details>
<summary>Hay Golem Details</summary>

### Behaviour
* Plants crops on available farmland
* Uses bonemeal to accelerate growth
* Pulls seeds and bonemeal from nearby containers
* Attacks skeletons and collects bones
* Avoids cows and sheep
* Immune to arrow damage

### Healing
* Bonemeal

### How to Build
* Place 2 **Hay Bale** blocks vertically
* Place a **Carved Pumpkin** on top
The golem will form immediately once the structure is complete.

</details>



## Mud Golem

The Mud Golem handles harvesting and storage, completing the farming cycle.

<details>
<summary>Mud Golem Details</summary>

### Behaviour
* Harvests fully grown crops
* Deposits items into nearby containers
* Monitors crops and reacts to interference
* Attacks entities that break crops
* Otherwise neutral
* Moves slowly but consistently

### Healing
* Mud

### How to Build
* Place two **Mud Block**s vertically with one block either side of the top one for arms
* Place a **Carved Pumpkin** on top
The golem will activate and begin working nearby farmland.

</details>

***

## Gameplay Integration

Utility Golems is designed to integrate cleanly into survival gameplay:

*   No configuration menus
*   No artificial systems
*   Behaviour is driven by the environment

Golems rely on:

*   Nearby containers
*   Available resources
*   Player placement and setup

This encourages simple but effective farm design without replacing core gameplay.

## Development Notes

*   This is an early release
*   Currently implemented:
    *   Hay Golem
    *   Mud Golem

Additional utility golems are planned

## Installation

*   Install Minecraft Forge for 1.20.1
*   Install Geckolib (latest) for Forge 1.20.1
*   Place the mod file and dependencies in your `mods` folder
*   Launch the game

## Feedback

Feedback, suggestions, and bug reports are welcome and will help guide future updates.
